description: Style Note shorts are the coolest bottoms to wear in the current season - and perhaps the most versatile too. Slip into this pair when on a long journey, a casual day at home or at the gym. Pair them with sports shoes or flip flops to suit the occasion. Product Details Black shorts, has a soft elasticated waistband, drawstring tie at the waist, two insert pockets in front on the sides, brand patch on the left below the insert pocket and floral print with adidas branding print above the hem on the left Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach or tumble dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32”) is wearing a size M
